'''dawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeomanlike|yeomanlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeomanlike|yeomanlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dawate|dawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dawatesher|dawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dawatesherĂ«m|dawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dawatero|dawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dawateshĂ«|dawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dawateshĂ«m|dawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidawatero|gokidawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidawateshĂ«|gokidawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidawateshĂ«m|gokidawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godawankerom|godawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godawankeshĂ«|godawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godawankeshĂ«m|godawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godawankeya|godawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dawaterom|dawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dawatemu|dawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dawateya|dawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidawaterom|gokidawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidawatemu|gokidawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidawateya|gokidawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dawawate|dawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dawawatesher|dawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dawawatesherĂ«m|dawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dawawatero|dawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dawawateshĂ«|dawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dawawateshĂ«m|dawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidawawatero|gokidawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidawawateshĂ«|gokidawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidawawateshĂ«m|gokidawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godawawankerom|godawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godawawankeshĂ«|godawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godawawankeshĂ«m|godawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godawawankeya|godawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dawawaterom|dawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dawawatemu|dawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dawawateya|dawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidawawaterom|gokidawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidawawatemu|gokidawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidawawateya|gokidawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠte|dĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠtesher|dĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠtero|dĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠwĂŠtero|gokidĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠwĂŠnkerom|godĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠwĂŠnkeya|godĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠterom|dĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠtemu|dĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠwĂŠteya|dĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠwĂŠterom|gokidĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠwĂŠteya|gokidĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafwafte|dafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafwaftesher|dafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafwaftesherĂ«m|dafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafwaftero|dafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafwafteshĂ«|dafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafwafteshĂ«m|dafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafwaftero|gokidafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafwafteshĂ«|gokidafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafwafteshĂ«m|gokidafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafwafnkerom|godafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafwafnkeshĂ«|godafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafwafnkeshĂ«m|godafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafwafnkeya|godafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafwafterom|dafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafwaftemu|dafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafwafteya|dafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafwafterom|gokidafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafwaftemu|gokidafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafwafteya|gokidafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
